REQUEST: GET https://api.example.com/weather?location=Munich&unit=fahrenheit

GET /weather?location=Munich&unit=fahrenheit HTTP/1.1
Host: api.example.com
User-Agent: Go-http-client/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip

RESPONSE: 200 OK

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json
Date: Tue, 28 May 2024 10:00:00 GMT
Content-Length: 72

{"temperature":65.5,"location":"Munich","unit":"fahrenheit"}
